parameter.value: Greetings, |PLAYERNAME|. I sell the legendary {magic powder} used to forge weapons into {Rare}, {Epic}, or even {Legendary}.
Hold on, |PLAYERNAME|. I'm already talking to another warrior.
Come back when you're ready to forge your destiny.
The forge grows cold without your presence...
Perhaps next time your steel will be ready.
You need more gold to touch the power of the forge.
